description: Provision infrastructure with Terraform as a Dagster asset.

working_dir.label: Working Dir
working_dir.description: Path to the Terraform root module directory

workspace.label: Workspace
workspace.description: Terraform workspace to select before running. Uses the default workspace if None.

var_files.label: Var Files
var_files.description: List of .tfvars files passed as -var-file arguments

vars.label: Vars
vars.description: Inline variable overrides passed as -var key=value

targets.label: Targets
targets.description: Limit apply/plan scope to specific resources via -target

auto_approve.label: Auto Approve
auto_approve.description: Pass -auto-approve to apply/destroy. Set False to require manual approval.

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

description.label: Description
description.description: Human-readable description of what this Terraform module provisions

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream Dagster asset keys this asset depends on (e.g. [
